name: Networks
description: Key terms behind the protocols and layers that move data.

group.definition: A numerical label assigned to each device on a network, used to identify and route data to it.
The system that translates human-readable domain names into IP addresses.
A connection-oriented transport protocol that guarantees reliable, ordered delivery of data.
A lightweight, connectionless transport protocol that prioritizes speed over guaranteed delivery.
A formatted unit of data carried across a network, containing a header and payload.
A device that forwards data packets between networks, directing traffic toward its destination.
The time it takes for data to travel from source to destination across a network.
The maximum rate at which data can be transferred over a network connection.
